---
title: IceCube Energy Regression v0 Schema Notes
description: Pending schema notes for IceCube neutrino-energy regression submissions.
---

Schema details are pending.

This page should eventually define optical-module observations, event-level features, target-energy conventions, uncertainty fields, split names, and the HDF5 submission layout expected by the validation service.

## Expected coverage

| Area | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| Files | HDF5 group layout, event identifiers, and shard naming |
| Inputs | Optical-module charge, timing summaries, reconstructed event fields, and geometry references |
| Targets | Neutrino energy convention and optional uncertainty fields |
| Splits | Public training, validation, and hidden evaluation split policy |
| Submission | Required prediction fields for `opendc eval send <submission.h5>` |
